use_codes.desc: REDUCING THE RISK OF STROKE AND SYSTEMIC EMBOLISM
PROPHYLAXIS OF DEEP VEIN THROMBOSIS AND PULMONARY EMBOLISM
REDUCE THE RISK OF RECURRENT DEEP VEIN THROMBOSIS (DVT)
REDUCE THE RISK OF RECURRENT PULMONARY EMBOLISM

indications.text:
1.1 Reduction of Risk of Stroke and Systemic Embolism in
Nonvalvular Atrial Fibrillation

ELIQUIS (apixaban) is indicated to reduce the risk of stroke and systemic embolism in patients
with nonvalvular atrial fibrillation.
